chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI CP No.D-2439 of 2020 ____________________________________________________________________ Date Order with Signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For order on CMA No.17374/2025 2. For order on CMA No.15543/2020 3. For hearing of CMA No.11104/2020 4. For hearing of main case 17.09.2025 Mr. Muhammad Bilal Khan, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Sanaullah, advocate for the respondent Mr. Muhammad Rafiq Rajori, AAG --------- The main grievance of the learned counsel for the petitioner is that a residential property, being Plot No.21/222, Block No.7 & 8, Karachi Memon Cooperative Housing Society, Karachi, admeasuring 863 square yards, is being illegally constructed in violation of the approved building plan. Learned counsel for the petitioner states that he has not filed any complaint through Smart Complaint Redressal Management System (SCRMS). Learned counsel for the petitioner, if so advised, may file a complaint through SCRMS which the SBCA shall decide in accordance with its own SOPs. A copy of this order shall be sent to the D.G SBCA for information and compliance if need be. The petition stands disposed of in the above terms alongwith pending application(s). Head of Const. Benches JUDGE Nadir*
